raw_consumer_statement: I contacted XXXX XXXX XXXX which is associated with Cinch back in XX/XX/year>. The gentleman I spoke to to cancel my warranty could not even find my information in the system and was unable to help me. I called again and and requested my warranty be canceled. i wrote letters to XXXX XXXX card and XXXX XXXX XXXX, finally I received an email stating that as of XX/XX/year> the warranty was canceled. I continued to receive bills from XXXX XXXX for the warranty. I again requested the bills to be stopped. I filed disputes with XXXX. As of this date and time I am not getting any resolution to this issue.
